toggles.label: Include Refit Options in the Listbuilder

factions.name: The Kriegsmarine
additionalRules: Radar - When using Rader, you must specify you are using it in the Front, Aft, Port, or Starboard Arc. You may only detec targets in this arc and iwll automatically lose all Detected targets if oyu switch arc; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 216

factions.name: Royal Navy
additionalRules: Depth Charge Attacks - MTBs may use Depth Charge attacks while in base contact with target ship During the Gunnery Phase, roll a D6. On a 6+, attack is successfull. Roll 6 Damage Dice against the enemy ship with AP Score of +1; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 131

VT Fuses - Light Guns with the DP Trait, gain VT Fuses. When performing an attack against Aircraft, you may use entire Attack Dice pool instead of half. Cannot be used prior to 1943; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 131

factions.name: Regia Marina
additionalRules: Poor Coordination - If your fleet possesses any Flights of Aircraft other than those launched from carriers, it will suffer a -1 Penalty to its Initiative throughout the battle; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 259
Star Shell X - May fire Star Shells in Night Battles: Pg. 259
Unwilling Soldiers - All ships suffer a -1 Penalty to their Crew Quality Checks; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 259

factions.name: Imperial Japanese Navy
additionalRules: Long Lance - If range to target exceeds 20in, roll a D6 for each torpedo that successfully hits, on a 6+ it hits as Normal, otherwise count it as a miss. May only reload Long Lance torpedoes once per battle; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 233

Fan Salvoes - Any ship capable of firing 3 or more Type 93 Attack Dice may launch a single 'Fan Salvo' after fleets have been deployed, but before the battle begins. Roll a D6 for every ship taking part in the fan Salvo, on a 6+ a random Enemy Ship will be hit; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 233
Fire Fighting - Each of your ships with a Crew area Critical Score of 2 or more suffers a -1 penalty to all Damage Control Rolls; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 233

factions.name: United States Navy
additionalRules: Torpedoes - For each successful Attack Dice rolled for Torpedoes in Scenarios taking place up to the end of 1943, roll and extra dice. On a 5+, Torpedo Hits as Normal, otherwise count it as a miss; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 170

VT Fuses - Light Guns with the DP Trait, gain VT Fuses. When performing an attack against Aircraft, you may use entire Attack Dice pool instead of half. Cannot be used prior to 1943; Victory at Sea Rule Book: Pg. 170
